narrative:
Vienna Twp C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 803 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
